reports.title: Broken streetlight on Nimmanhaemin Road
reports.description: Streetlight has been out for 3 nights. The intersection near Soi 11 is very dark and unsafe for pedestrians at night. Multiple neighbors have reported near-misses with motorbikes.
reports.address: Nimmanhaemin Road, Suthep, Mueang Chiang Mai

reports.title: Illegal waste dumping near canal
reports.description: A pile of construction debris and household waste has been dumped along the canal embankment. Risk of contamination after the next rain. Needs cleanup by municipal services.
reports.address: Canal Road, Chang Khlan, Mueang Chiang Mai

reports.title: Community garden cleanup completed
reports.description: The volunteer team finished restoring the community garden behind the temple. New benches installed and pathway repainted. Open to all residents on weekends.
reports.address: Tha Phae Gate, Phra Sing, Mueang Chiang Mai
